element.description: Boxed-square door-type callouts (1, 2, 3) and hexagon window-type callouts (1, 2, 3) are printed at each opening around the plan, referencing the A-08 door/window schedule (see หน้า10). Legible tags: door type 2 at bedroom (นอน1/นอน2) and kitchen-prep openings, door type 3 at the bathroom, door type 1 (sliding) at the entry/porch, window type 1 at both bedrooms, window type 2/3 near ซักล้าง and เตรียมอาหาร.

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER (reporting only, master file not edited): the top dimension chain on this sheet reads, left to right: 1.30 (roof overhang) | 2.55 | 1.45 (=4.00, grid1-grid2) | 3.00 (grid2-grid3) | 0.60 | 0.90 (=1.50 beyond grid3) | then a further 1.30 roof overhang. This independently confirms dummy grid '1'' at exactly 2.55 m from grid 1 (the full-height wall between นอน1/นอน2) — HIGH CONFIDENCE, matches the master file's value exactly. It also confirms a two-step sub-division beyond grid 3 (+0.60 then +0.90, totaling +1.50 = dummy grid '3'' at pos_m 8.5) matching the master file's value, BUT see หน้า07_elevation1.json/หน้า09_section1.json — those sheets show a DIFFERENT sub-division beyond grid 3 (+0.60 then +0.70, totaling +1.30) for the roof-overhang dimension specifically, which is a separate element (roof edge) from this floor plan's wall/room extension (+1.50). Not a contradiction once understood as two different building elements, but worth the master file noting explicitly which +1.50 sub-break (0.60/0.90) belongs to the WALL and which +1.30 sub-break (0.60/0.70) belongs to the ROOF OVERHANG, since both start with an identical '0.60' first segment and could be conflated.

Left dimension chain (D-C-B-A + south extension) matches the 4.00/2.00/3.50/[1.50] pattern used to derive dummy grids A'/A'' in the master file — consistent with this floor plan (see หน้า05_site_plan and หน้า09_section2 for the fuller south-of-A breakdown and a caveat on whether A'' is a real structural line).
Individual door/window counts per room were not confidently countable at this image resolution — flagged for zoom review rather than guessed.
This page also contains a second view (แปลนหลังคา, roof plan) on the same sheet A-04 — see sibling file _หน้า06_roof_plan.json.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า06_floor_plan.json — same room layout and same grid dummy readings; t2's own warnings already flagged the same 3'/0.60-sub-line ambiguity, corroborated further here by comparing against the elevation/section sheets.
